title: Pre-Meeting Discovery Question Bank
description: Standard questions to ask in every client discovery call to ensure BRD can be fully populated.

questions: Can you describe your business and the industry you operate in?
What specific problem or opportunity is driving this project?
What does your current process or system look like today (as-is state)?
Why is the current situation no longer adequate?
What happens to your business if this project is not built?
What does success look like for this project 6 months after launch?
Can you define 3-5 measurable outcomes you expect from this project?
Are there any hard deadlines we must meet and why?
What is the overall budget range for this project?
Who are the key decision makers for this project on your side?
Who will be the primary point of contact for requirements and approvals?
Are there any departments or teams whose buy-in is critical?
Who are the end users of the system and what are their technical skill levels?
What are the absolute must-have features for the first release?
What features are important but can wait for a later phase?
Is there anything you explicitly do NOT want in scope?
Are there any existing systems this must replace or work alongside?
Who are all the different types of users who will use this system?
What can each user type see and do that others cannot?
Who has the highest level of administrative access?
Will external parties like vendors or partners need access?
Can you walk us through the most critical user journey step by step?
Are there any business rules that govern how the system must behave?
What notifications or alerts does the system need to send and to whom?
Does the system need to support multiple languages or currencies?
What existing systems does this new platform need to connect with?
For each integration — is the API documented and are credentials available?
Should data sync be real-time or batch? At what frequency?
What happens if an integration goes down — what is the fallback?
How many users do you expect at launch? What is peak concurrent usage?
What is acceptable page load time for your users?
What uptime SLA do you require (99%, 99.9%, 99.99%)?
Are there specific browsers, devices, or operating systems that must be supported?
Do you have any accessibility requirements (WCAG standards)?
What types of sensitive data will the system store (PII, financial, health)?
Are there regulatory compliance requirements (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, Indian IT Act)?
Are there data residency requirements — must data stay in a specific country?
How long must data be retained and what is the archival/deletion policy?
Do you have an existing data migration requirement from legacy systems?
Are there any technology choices already mandated (cloud provider, framework, database)?
Do you have existing infrastructure we must work within?
Is there anything on your side that has a dependency or timeline we should know about?
What assumptions are you making about what we will deliver?
What reports or dashboards are critical for your business operations?
Who needs access to analytics and at what level of detail?
Do you need data export capabilities and in what formats?
Are there any third-party analytics tools you already use that we should integrate with?
